title: Visible Surface Compression Closeout
summary: Classify #352-#354 after the product-shape compression slice landed.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Inventory the current visible product surface before the next subtraction slice
issue_classifications.evidence: docs/reviews/visible-product-surface-inventory-2026-04-26.md classifies the requested visible surfaces by role and authority and identifies concrete compression candidates.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Compress generated adapter surfaces behind contract-backed renderers
issue_classifications.evidence: llms.txt, AGENTS.md, tools/AGENT_QUICKSTART.md, and tools/AGENT_ROUTING.md now route ordinary startup through agentic-workspace start; renderer and drift-check payload copies were updated so adapters stay non-authoritative.

issue_classifications.title: [Workspace]: Prove the compact report remains a router after the contract and memory tranche
issue_classifications.evidence: Default report payload now carries router_shape_guard metadata and tests assert high-volume sections stay out of the default report.
